title: Codex Desktop fallback readiness status
user_task: Given a target Codex thread whose Desktop visibility is not proven, report CUA-first and Peekaboo-secondary fallback readiness, blockers, focus state, and visible-screen warning without performing any GUI action.
allowed_live_behaviors: optional bounded visible metadata observation only when explicitly requested
expected_public_safe_evidence: coherence state that does not claim Desktop visibility when only cli_visible or unknown
CUA Driver preferred backend readiness, blockers, permission state, and focus probe result
Peekaboo secondary fallback readiness, blockers, and visible-screen warning
actionsPerformed flags showing no live Codex control, no GUI mutation, no screenshot capture, and no raw transcript read
public-safe scan with zero raw transcript, screenshot, token, cookie, and path leaks
proof_boundary: Proves only public-safe CUA/Peekaboo fallback readiness reporting for Codex Desktop visibility gaps. It does not prove Codex GUI mutation, prompt typing, clicking, refresh/restart, arbitrary desktop control, or unattended visible collaboration.
next_action: If fallback readiness is blocked, keep Desktop-visible collaboration out of claims. If a future claim needs visible collaboration, collect an exact action-bound runtime proof through the desktop live-proof harness and proof-report gates.
